summary: Implemented Playwright E2E latency metric collection, explicit hard-budget measured steps, latency summary generation, and focused response-time coverage.
changed: Added Playwright performance fixture and latency helper
Added E2E latency summary and wrapper scripts
Switched root Playwright specs to the performance fixture
Added explicit measured public, admin, and AI latency flows
Updated E2E npm scripts for latency summary generation

validations.command: npx eslint src tests playwright.config.ts next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs

validations.result: passed: 12 tests, 12 latency artifacts, 0 budget failures, 0 warnings
passed: 569 passed, 8 skipped, 0 failed, 575 latency artifacts, 0 hard budget failures, 89 warnings

risks: Full-suite summary contains 89 warning-level latency observations
Heavy media/corpus/visual specs remain measurement-first until thresholds are calibrated from multiple full-run summaries
Browser interaction timings should be treated as trend data outside explicit measured step budgets
recommendation: Keep the latency system and run npm run test:e2e:latency for performance-sensitive changes. The full 577-test E2E suite is green against the compose stack with latency artifacts generated.
